description: Style NoteEvery item of clothing requires a different kind of innerwear to give the best comfort and the right look. enamor specialises in customised innerwear which will ensure a good overall look for you and lasting comfort throughout the day. And no need to compromise on the trendy look and style of your innerwear either, Enamor is your go to brand for the innerwear that takes care of all your requirements. Product DetailsPeachy pink briefs, has a soft elasticated waistband with a bow detail, lace detail in front, elasticated around the leg openings and polyamide soft stretch fabric at the backMaterial and CareFabric: 83% nylon and 17% spandexTrims: 92% nylon and 8% spandexHand washDrip dry
